# Rettangoli
> Rettangoli is a library suite for building frontend and terminal UI applications, documenting them, and running visual tests.

This file is a curated index for LLM-based tools. Prefer linked docs over guessing behavior.

## Projects
- **Rettangoli FE**: Schema-driven app layer with component architecture, handlers, store/actions, and view data flow.
- **Rettangoli UI**: Web component and primitive library with tokenized styling and responsive behavior.
- **Rettangoli TUI**: Terminal UI runtime with FE-compatible component contracts and native TUI primitives.
- **Rettangoli VT**: Visual testing runner for capture, compare, reporting, and CI-friendly workflows.
- **Rettangoli Sites**: Markdown-first documentation/site generator used to build structured docs portals.

## Core Docs
- https://rettangoli.dev/fe/docs/introduction/introduction.md
- https://rettangoli.dev/fe/docs/introduction/getting-started.md

## Sites Quick Start (No Guessing)
Use this exact flow.

1. Monorepo docs site (`apps/rettangoli.dev`)
   - `bun install` (repo root)
   - `cd apps/rettangoli.dev`
   - `bun run dev` (watch + serve on `http://localhost:3001`)
   - `bun run build` (output: `apps/rettangoli.dev/_site`)

2. New standalone site
   - `bunx rtgl sites init my-site --template default`
   - `cd my-site`
   - `bunx rtgl sites watch`
   - `bunx rtgl sites build`

## Sites Agent Bootstrap (If You Only Receive This File + A Prompt)
When asked to start a new `rtgl-sites` project, do this exact sequence:

1. Scaffold
   - `bunx rtgl sites init <project-name> --template default`
   - `cd <project-name>`
2. Configure imports in `sites.config.yaml` using the alias map below (all pre-provided templates/partials).
3. Create/update `data/site.yaml`, `data/seo.yaml`, and page files to match the selected template schema.
4. Validate page/template data against `data-contract.schema.yaml` (`$defs/template.*` and `$defs/partial.*`).
5. Run `bunx rtgl sites watch` for development and `bunx rtgl sites build` for production output.

Default output path: `_site/`.

## Sites Templates (Use These, Don’t Invent New Ones First)
- CLI scaffold template: `default`
- Templates inside scaffolded `default`: `base`, `post`
- `rtgl sites init --template <name>` supports scaffold templates only (currently `default`).
- Built-in templates below are import aliases for `sites.config.yaml` and should not be passed to `rtgl sites init --template`.
- Built-in import templates:
  - `base`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/base.yaml`
  - `docs`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/docs.yaml`
  - `landing-features`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/landing-features.yaml`
  - `blog-article-list`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/blog-article-list.yaml`
  - `blog-article`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/blog-article.yaml`
- `apps/rettangoli.dev` local templates:
  - `tui-documentation`: `apps/rettangoli.dev/templates/tui-documentation.yaml`
  - `ansi-json-documentation`: `apps/rettangoli.dev/templates/ansi-json-documentation.yaml`

## Sites Pre-Provided Partials (Use These)
- `seo`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/seo.yaml`
- `navbar`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/navbar.yaml`
- `mobile-nav`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/mobile-nav.yaml`
- `docs-sidebar`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/docs-sidebar.yaml`
- `docs-mobile-nav`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/docs-mobile-nav.yaml`
- `top-navbar`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/top-navbar.yaml`
- `landing-hero`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/landing-hero.yaml`
- `landing-features-section`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/landing-features-section.yaml`
- `landing-cta`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/landing-cta.yaml`
- `footer`: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/footer.yaml`

## Sites Alias Map (Copy Into `sites.config.yaml`)
```yaml
imports:
  templates:
    base: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/base.yaml
    docs: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/docs.yaml
    landing-features: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/landing-features.yaml
    blog-article-list: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/blog-article-list.yaml
    blog-article: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/templates/blog-article.yaml
  partials:
    seo: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/seo.yaml
    navbar: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/navbar.yaml
    mobile-nav: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/mobile-nav.yaml
    docs-sidebar: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/docs-sidebar.yaml
    docs-mobile-nav: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/docs-mobile-nav.yaml
    top-navbar: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/top-navbar.yaml
    landing-hero: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/landing-hero.yaml
    landing-features-section: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/landing-features-section.yaml
    landing-cta: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/landing-cta.yaml
    footer: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/partials/footer.yaml
```

## Sites Data Schemas
- Canonical schema file: `packages/rettangoli-sites/sites/schemas/data-contract.schema.yaml`
- Published schema URL: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@rettangoli/sites@1.0.0-rc12/sites/schemas/data-contract.schema.yaml`
- Docs: `https://rettangoli.dev/sites/docs/reference/data-contract-schemas.md`
- Use `$defs/template.*` for template data and `$defs/partial.*` for partial data.

## rettangoli.dev Template Routing
- `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/index.yaml` -> `template: base`
- `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/sites/docs/**` -> `template: docs`
- `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/ui/docs/**`, `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/fe/docs/**`, `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/vt/docs/**` -> `template: docs`
- `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/tui/docs/**` -> `template: tui-documentation`
- `apps/rettangoli.dev/pages/ansi-json/docs/**` -> `template: ansi-json-documentation`

## Notes
- UI docs describe current attribute names and behavior; treat those as source of truth for component usage.
- TUI docs describe FE-compatible component contracts and terminal-native runtime behavior.
- VT docs define capture/report workflow, config contract, and step action semantics.
- FE docs define schema, handlers, state flow, and architecture conventions.
